channel_news.title: Quip’s latest ad wasn’t AI-generated. People were convinced it was
channel_news.summary: Quip’s latest ad was entirely human-made, but it still received social media comments from people who assumed it was generated with AI. Here's how the brand responded.

channel_news.title: Suri got shoppers on board with recycling toothbrush heads. Now, it is turning them into soap dishes
channel_news.summary: Oral care brand Suri has put true circularity at the heart of its next product line, turning recycled toothbrush heads into soap dishes. Here's what it took to pull that off.

channel_news.title: How Urban Outfitters co-creates campaigns with Gen Z
channel_news.summary: Urban Outfitters likes to say it doesn't just create campaigns with Gen Z -- it also produces campaigns with them. UO's Cyntia Leo shares how the brand does exactly that.

channel_news.title: New awards program: Next Gen Store Awards open for entries

channel_news.title: Williams-Sonoma relaunches Dormify a year after acquiring IP
channel_news.summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. is officially relaunching dorm room furnishings brand Dormify after acquiring its intellectual property in May.
